SELECT * FROM sql_tables('Local Virtuoso', 'Demo', NULL, NULL, NULL);
SELECT * FROM sql_tables('Local Virtuoso', 'Demo', 'C%', NULL, NULL);
SELECT * FROM sql_tables('Local Virtuoso', 'Demo', NULL, 'Categories', NULL);
SELECT * FROM sql_tables('Local Virtuoso', 'Demo', NULL, NULL, 'TABLE');
SELECT * FROM sql_tables('Local Virtuoso', 'Demo', NULL, 'Or%', NULL);
SELECT * FROM sql_tables('Local Virtuoso', 'Demo', NULL, NULL, 'VIEW');
SELECT t.* FROM (SELECT * FROM sql_tables('Local Virtuoso', 'Demo', NULL, NULL, NULL)) AS t WHERE t.table_name LIKE 'Pro%';
SELECT t1.* FROM sql_tables('Local Virtuoso', 'Demo', NULL, NULL, NULL) AS t1 JOIN sql_tables('Local Virtuoso', 'Demo', 'C%', NULL, NULL) AS t2 ON t1.table_name = t2.table_name;
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM sql_tables('Local Virtuoso', 'Demo', NULL, NULL, NULL) UNION SELECT * FROM sql_tables('Local Virtuoso', 'Demo', 'S%', 'Suppliers', NULL)) AS combined_tables;
